source_pr.title: executor: only retry needed regions when get region row count
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fast analyze will retry all the regions when one of the requests of getting region row count failed, in cases that there are many regions and updates, fast analyze would never succeed.

### What is changed and how it works?

Only retry the needed region instead of all the regions.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - None

Related changes

 - None

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a data race in fast-analyze concurrency (signaling `wg.Done()` before clearing pending work in a channel). This PR stabilizes it by reordering the cleanup so the channel is drained before calling `wg.Done()`.
fix_pattern: Fix goroutine synchronization by draining/clearing pending channel items before calling WaitGroup.Done().
